description_long: This is a blue grocery bag with a rectangular base and slightly flared sides, featuring two sturdy red loop handles attached at the top. The front face of the bag is decorated with four large, light-colored geometric symbols: a square, triangle, cross, and circle, reminiscent of PlayStation controller icons. The bag appears to be made of a semi-rigid, possibly laminated or coated material, giving it a smooth and slightly glossy finish. The interior is empty and spacious, with the bag standing upright and the handles arching above the opening. The sides and back of the bag are plain blue, with no additional markings or designs.
description: A blue grocery bag with red loop handles and PlayStation-style geometric symbols on the front, made of a smooth, semi-rigid material.
description_view_0: Front view showing the blue bag with red handles and four large PlayStation-style symbols.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain blue surface and the red handles, with the bag's opening visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain blue surface with red handles, no symbols or markings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with plain blue surface and visible handles.
attribute_branding_or_logo: Front features PlayStation-style geometric symbols (square, triangle, cross, circle) in light gray.
